limits_text:
Limits:
- Files <=50 MB are sent to chat.
- Files >50 MB are delivered as a link (gofile.io).
- One job at a time.
- Minimum pause between downloads: 30 seconds.
faq_text:
FAQ:
1) To trim — send range like 0:10-0:40 after choosing 'Yes'.
not_allowed: Sorry, this bot is only for owners 😎
owners_only: This feature is only for owners.
start_prompt: Send a SoundCloud or YouTube link 🎧/🎥
need_link: I need a SoundCloud or YouTube link.
cooldown: Not so often — wait for a {seconds} sec.
already_running: You already have a task running. Please wait.
downloading_no_trim: Downloading without trimming... Please wait a bit.
ask_trim_track: Do you want to trim the track before sending?
ask_trim_before_send: Do you want to trim before sending?
invalid_link: Invalid link — send a direct SoundCloud or YouTube URL.
stale_button_alert: This button is outdated. Send the link again.
stale_button_reply: This button is outdated. Send a SoundCloud or YouTube link 🎧/🎥
cancelled_send_link: Cancelled. Send a SoundCloud or YouTube link 🎧/🎥
invalid_format:
Invalid format! Example: 0:45-2:30
Or type 'cancel' / press cancel.
invalid_range: Invalid range: end time must be greater than start time. Try again (e.g., 0:10-0:45).
too_long: Track/video is too long ({hours} h). Maximum {max_hours} h.
file_too_big:
The file is too large to send via Telegram. Download link:
{link}
file_send_fail: Can't send file to chat. Try later.
generic_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
uploading_note: Uploading to external server — this may take a bit longer...
stalled_note: Network stall detected, stopping the job...
reset_confirm_text: Are you sure? This will reset all settings to default.
err_timeout: Server took too long to respond. Try again.
err_file_not_found: Couldn't find the file after download. The link may be invalid.
err_not_available: Video or track is unavailable. It may be removed or private.
err_network: Network or server problem. Check your connection.
err_stale_button: This button is outdated. Send the link again.
unknown_worker_result: Unexpected worker result. Please try again.
